jei_audit.title: After Phase 17 Mastery Age transition — open JEI and audit all newly unlocked recipes

age_craft.title: Craft one item from a newly unlocked Mastery Age recipe — prove the transition fired correctly

subtitle.text: The last age. Everything left in the pack unlocks. Check JEI. The list will be longer than you expect.

description: CH.17 · PHASE 17: MASTERY AGE
▸ The quantum_mechanism triggers Phase 17: Mastery Age.',
This is the final History Stages age transition.',
There are 17 ages in this pack.',
You have lived through all of them.',
The Mastery Age is not a new age.',
It is the age where all previous ages are simultaneously active.',
◈ WHAT UNLOCKS IN MASTERY AGE
└ All remaining age-locked recipes in KubeJS (age_lock.js)',
└ Divine/PTD endgame recipes (if Stone was crafted)',
└ Celestisynth final variants (if any age-gated)',
└ T.O. Magic additional spells (void school extension)',
└ Create Teleporters advanced mechanics',
└ Any remaining TFMG/Create ecosystem recipes',
└ Full ISS Eldritch school above-cap spells',
└ Final nuclear chain (Cannon Nukes mass production)',
◈ POST-TRANSITION AUDIT
└ Open JEI immediately after age transition',
└ Filter by: undefined / new / recently-unlocked if JEI supports it',
└ Otherwise: check all major mod namespaces for new recipes:',
celestisynth: | divine: | traveloptics: | canonnukes: | createteleporters:',
└ Write down what you find — some recipes are time-limited by material supply',
(if a recipe requires something you have only 1 of, plan before crafting)',
◈ AGE CONFIRMATION
└ History Stages age: check with command or HUD indicator',
└ Chat notification: "Phase 17 — Mastery Age" on transition',
└ If transition did not fire: verify quantum_mechanism was crafted',
(not just components — the mechanism itself)',
└ If still not firing: check KubeJS age_lock.js for trigger condition',
▸ Every previous age had a trigger.',
First stone tools. First fire. First netherite.',
First portal. First dragon. First lacrima.',
First quantum mechanism.',
The Mastery Age is the last trigger.',
After this: no more gates.',
The world is fully open.',
What you do with a fully open world',
is the remainder of the story.',
▶ Audit all Mastery Age JEI unlocks [check]
▶ Craft one item from a newly unlocked recipe [check]
◇ The Mastery Age does not end the pack.',
The pack has no forced ending.',
The story ends when you decide it does.',
The questbook ends at ch17_gate.',
What comes after the gate is yours to define.
